C:\Users\Admin\miniconda3\envs\stitch_cpp_env\Library\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\stitch_44v11.dir/objects.a
D:\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\stitch_44v11.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\stitch_44v11.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\stitch_44v11.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o stitch_44v11.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libstitch_44v11.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\stitch_44v11.dir\linkLibs.rsp
